description: Legal document in Arabic script. On verso accounts in Arabic script and the draft of a beginning of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Late, probably Mamluk or early Ottoman-era. Partnership agreement (... على سبيل الشركة الشرعية ....) between Yūnus b. al-Ḥājj b. ʿAbd al-Qādir and Yūsuf b. al-Ḥājj. Mentions the district of Sindiyūn (near Qalyūb). Dated: 13 Rabiʿ I, but the year is damaged. Needs further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
